events.description: The ego vehicle changes lanes to the left to move out from behind a silver van.
The ego vehicle changes to the leftmost lane to pass a white SUV.
The ego-vehicle moves from the rightmost lane to the lane on its left, passing a silver van. / The ego vehicle changes from the right lane to the left lane on a multi-lane highway.

The ego-vehicle moves from the left lane into the right lane behind a white pickup truck. / The ego vehicle moves from the left lane to the right lane, and a white pickup truck then overtakes it on the left.
The ego-vehicle moves one lane to the left to get out from behind a white pickup truck.
The ego-vehicle moves from the right lane into the middle lane to pass a slower truck. / The ego-vehicle moves another lane to the left to pass a dark pickup truck.
The ego-vehicle moves from the middle lane into the left lane.
The ego-vehicle moves left from the rightmost lane into the middle lane. / The ego vehicle changes into the adjacent left lane, following a white SUV.
The ego-vehicle makes a lane change to the left, following a black SUV.

The ego-vehicle changes lanes to the right on a multi-lane highway. / The ego vehicle makes a gradual lane change to the right into the adjacent lane. / The ego-vehicle changes from the left lane to the middle lane on a multi-lane highway.
The ego vehicle moves from the second lane from the left into the far left lane.
The ego vehicle drifts from the middle lane into the left lane behind another vehicle.

The ego-vehicle moves from the left lane into the right lane behind a white pickup truck. / The ego vehicle moves from the left lane to the right lane, and a white pickup truck then overtakes it on the left.

The ego-vehicle changes lanes to the right on a multi-lane highway. / The ego vehicle makes a gradual lane change to the right into the adjacent lane. / The ego-vehicle changes from the left lane to the middle lane on a multi-lane highway.
The ego vehicle moves from the second lane from the left into the far left lane.
